OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: This IP creates records for contract, contract payment agreement and Preventive Care Agreement
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: CreatePreventiveCareAgreementRecords

childElements.name: DM_CreateContract
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "ContextId" : "%ContextId%", "RecordTypeId" : "%DRE_GetRecordTypeId:recordType:Id%", "Status" : "=\"Draft\"" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateContract", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "accountName" : "%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:accRec:Name%", "contractId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec),%DM_CreateContract:Contract_1:Id%,%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec:Id%)", "accountId" : "%ContextId%", "agreementType" : "=\"Preventive Care Agreement\"", "typeOfRate" : "%typeOfRate%", "Status" : "=\"DRAFT\"" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreateContractPaymentAgreement", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DM_CreatePreventiveContractAgreement
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractPaymentAgreementId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec),%DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement:ContractPaymentAgreement_1:Id%,%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec:Id%)", "FacilityTitle" : "%ListOfFacilityTitleIds%", "Rate" : "%Rate%", "UnitOfMeasure" : "%UnitOfMeasure%", "BonusMeasureType" : "=\"NA\"", "TargetMeasurePercent" : "=0", "BonusPayout" : "=0" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DMCreatePreventiveContractAgreement", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction3", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_FetchContractAndCPA
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREFetchContractAndCPA", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "ContextId", "element" : "ContextId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_FetchPreventiveContractAgreementForShiftRates
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "contractPaymentAgreementId" : "=IF(ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec),%DM_CreateContractPaymentAgreement:ContractPaymentAgreement_1:Id%,%DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:cpaRec:Id%)" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREFetchPreventiveContractAgreementForShiftRates", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRE_GetRecordTypeId
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISBLANK(DRE_FetchContractAndCPA:contractRec)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "objectName" : "=\"Contract\"", "developerName" : "=\"Client\"" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREGetRecordTypeId", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction4", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: DRT_TransformPreventiveContractAgreementForShiftRates
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "" : "" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "DRE_FetchPreventiveContractAgreementForShiftRates:ExistingPCARecs", "sendJSONNode" : "ExistingPCARecs", "bundle" : "DRTTransformPreventiveContractAgreementForShiftRates", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

OmniIntegrationProcedure.propertySetConfig: { "linkToExternalObject" : "", "trackingCustomData" : { }, "includeAllActionsInResponse" : false, "columnsPropertyMap" : [ ], "relationshipFieldsMap" : [ ], "labelSingular" : "", "labelPlural" : "", "description" : "", "nameColumn" : "", "rollbackOnError" : false, "chainableQueriesLimit" : 50, "chainableDMLStatementsLimit" : null, "chainableCpuLimit" : 2000, "chainableHeapSizeLimit" : null, "chainableDMLRowsLimit" : null, "chainableQueryRowsLimit" : null, "chainableSoslQueriesLimit" : null, "chainableActualTimeLimit" : null, "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "queueableChainableQueriesLimit" : 120, "queueableChainableCpuLimit" : 40000, "queueableChainableHeapSizeLimit" : 6, "ttlMinutes" : 5, "mockResponseMap" : { } }
